debug_info.goal:
case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α
f : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α → F (α ::: @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α) :=
  fun self =>
    map
      (TypeVec.id :::
        @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk.corec n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α self) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α self))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest n F α self)
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
h_bisim :
  let un := @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b;
  ∃ R, @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α un R ∧ R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b = @MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α σ✝ un d'
⊢ map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) =
    map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))

verification_message:
Cannot build modified file: ╭─ Error at line 269:4
│      rfl
│     ^^^
╰─ error: Tactic `rfl` failed: The left-hand side
  (TypeVec.id ::: fun (init : a.σ) => ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim { σ := a.σ, dest' := a.dest', s := init })) <$$>
    a.dest' a.s
is not definitionally equal to the right-hand side
  (TypeVec.id ::: fun (init : b.σ) => ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim { σ := b.σ, dest' := b.dest', s := init })) <$$>
    b.dest' b.s

case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : StateCofixShrunk F α
f : Coalg F α → F (α ::: StateCofixShrunk F α) := fun self => (TypeVec.id ::: corec self.dest') <$$> self.dest
a b : Coalg F α
h_bisim :
  let un := a.union b;
  ∃ R, Coalg.IsBisim R ∧ R (Sum.inl a.s) (Sum.inr b.s)
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : a.union b = { σ := σ✝, dest' := un, s := d' }
⊢ (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim { σ := a.σ, dest' := a.dest', s := init })) <$$>
      a.dest' a.s =
    (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim { σ := b.σ, dest' := b.dest', s := init })) <$$>
      b.dest' b.s
